# System Report

> In-depth tech news, analysis, and a growing collection of private, browser-based tools. No uploads, no tracking, no accounts.

System Report (systemreport.net) publishes tech news, commentary on hardware and software, and free client-side utilities where user data never leaves the browser.

## Tools

- [EXIF Metadata Remover](https://www.systemreport.net/tools/exif-stripper/): Strip GPS coordinates, camera model, timestamps, and other EXIF metadata from JPEG, PNG, and WebP photos. 100% client-side — images never upload anywhere.
- [All tools](https://www.systemreport.net/tools/): Collection page listing current and upcoming browser-based utilities.

## Sections

- [Home](https://www.systemreport.net/): Front page with the latest stories.
- [Tech](https://www.systemreport.net/tech): Tech industry coverage.
- [AI](https://www.systemreport.net/ai): AI news and analysis.
- [Gaming](https://www.systemreport.net/gaming): Gaming industry coverage.
- [Software](https://www.systemreport.net/software): Software and developer-facing coverage.
- [Hardware](https://www.systemreport.net/hardware): Hardware reviews and news.

## Feeds

- [RSS](https://www.systemreport.net/rss.xml)
- [JSON Feed](https://www.systemreport.net/feed.json)
- [Podcast RSS (narrated articles)](https://www.systemreport.net/podcast.xml)

## APIs (machine-readable)

- [Article Index (JSON)](https://www.systemreport.net/data/posts.json): All published articles with title, URL, date, tags, hero image, and audio link.
- [Article Stream (NDJSON)](https://www.systemreport.net/data/clusters.jsonl): One JSON object per line. Suitable for streaming and incremental processing.
- [Market Data](https://www.systemreport.net/api/markets): Live cryptocurrency, stock index, forex, and commodity prices.

## Agent Discovery

- [API Catalog](https://www.systemreport.net/.well-known/api-catalog): RFC 9727 API discovery (application/linkset+json).
- [MCP Server Card](https://www.systemreport.net/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json): Model Context Protocol server capabilities.
- [A2A Agent Card](https://www.systemreport.net/.well-known/agent-card.json): Agent-to-agent discovery.
- [Agent Skills](https://www.systemreport.net/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json): Discoverable skills with SKILL.md specifications.

## About

- [About](https://www.systemreport.net/about): What System Report is and how it's built.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.systemreport.net/privacy): Data handling policy. Tools pages perform all processing in the browser; no files or form data are transmitted to the server.
- [Contact](https://www.systemreport.net/contact): Email contact@systemreport.net.
